data.title: TRX price forecast: Aims $0.32 breakout by April '26. TRON at $0.31, RSI 64.38 neutral. Predicts rise to $0.32 if support at $0.30 holds.
data.description: The cryptocurrency TRON is currently priced at $0.31, accompanied by a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) of 64.38. Based on technical analysis, there is a possibility of a breakout to the $0.32 resistance level within the next 4-6 weeks, provided that the current consolidation remains above the $0.30 support level.

data.title: Litecoin price aims to hit $60 by April 2026, currently trading at $56.44 with resistance at $57.73. Support crucial at...
data.description: Litecoin is currently trading at $56.44, displaying a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) and facing key resistance at $57.73. Technical analysis indicates that if bulls manage to surpass the current levels, Litecoin could potentially aim for a range between $60 to $62. It is crucial for critical support to be maintained at this level to sustain the upward momentum.

data.title: BCH may hit $495 by April with bullish momentum near $480 resistance. Technicals hint at breakout if $472 support holds.
data.description: Bitcoin Cash is currently demonstrating bullish momentum as it approaches the $480 resistance level. Analysts predict that BCH may climb to the range of $495-$500 in the next 2-3 weeks, provided that the current support level at $472 is maintained.

data.title: NEAR Protocol price may hit $1.46 by April 2026, currently at $1.30 with $1.32 key level for potential uptrend. (Read More)
data.description: The trading price of NEAR Protocol stands at $1.30, accompanied by a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) and bearish Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) momentum. Technical analysis indicates a possible upward shift towards the $1.46 upper Bollinger Band if buyers can regain control above the $1.32 mark.

data.title: Merck to Acquire Terns Pharmaceuticals, Inc., Expanding Its Hematology Pipeline With TERN-701, a Novel Candidate for Chronic Myeloid Leukemia (CML)
data.description: TERN-701, the primary candidate of Terns Pharmaceuticals, is undergoing Phase 1/2 trials. This drug is an experimental oral allosteric BCR::ABL1 tyrosine kinase inhibitor designed for specific patients with Chronic Myeloid Leukemia (CML).

data.title: Argus launches first Brazilian natural gas market price assessments
data.description: In an effort to increase transparency in the gas sector, a leading energy and commodity price reporting agency, Argus, has introduced the initial daily assessed price for Brazil's natural gas spot market. This move comes after Brazil recently opened up its natural gas market. The new daily price assessment is a significant step towards enhancing visibility and efficiency in the country's gas market. The launch is indicative of the growing importance of Brazil in the global energy landscape, highlighting the country's potential as a key player in the natural gas industry. This development provides market participants with crucial pricing information, facilitating better decision-making and fostering competition within the sector. It signifies a positive shift towards a more open and competitive gas market in Brazil.
